calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael B. Bassi, Esq. & law clerk Saishruti Mutneja for respondent/plaintiff St. George Pathfinders, Inc. with Michael Danich
Paul Michael Vuksich, Esq. for appellant/defendant All Cossack's Union of San Francisco with Nicholas Loukianoff & Michael Nikol

Settlement conference held before Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, pursuant to agreenent of the parties.The case does not settle.

The case proceeds to trial. Respondent/Plaintiff's witness Michael Danich is sworn and examined on direct. The following documentary evidence are marked for identification:
Exhibit 1 - Plaintiff's trial exhibits from the Small Claims trial
Exhibit 2 - Plaintiff's Supplemental exhibits

After the noon recess, Michael Danich testifies further on direct, followed by the Appellant's cross-examination. The following documentary evidence are introduced during the cross-examination.
Exhibit A - Defendant's Evidence with Supporting Declaration of Its President Nicholas A. Loukianoff
Exhibit B - Defendant's Supplemental Evidence with Supporting Declaration of Its President Nicholas A. Loukianoff
Exhibit C - Supplemental Declaration of Michael V. Nikol for the Defendant

After the Respondent's case is presented, the following Appellant's witnesses testify upon oath: Nicholas Loukianoff and Michael Niko.
After the direct testimony and cross examination of the witnesses, the Appellant/Defendant rests, and the parties present their closing arguments.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
All exhibits are admitted into evidence and retained.

Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported (606)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Set For Trial On Apr-11-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To Apr-11-19 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Vuksich, Attorney at law, representing appellants/defendants is present;
Michael Bassi, Attorney at Law, representing respondents/plaintiffs is also present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo.

The parties would not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter is transferred to the Master Calendar Department, Dept. 206, for reassignment.

Judge: Pro Tem: Marc Seidenfeld; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-27-2018 Continued To Feb-14-19 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
